contents:
[package]
name = "fix-path-env"
version = "0.0.0"
authors = ["Tauri Programme within The Commons Conservancy"]
license = "Apache-2.0 OR MIT"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
thiserror = "1"
home = "0.5"

[target."cfg(not(target_os = \"windows\"))".dependencies]
strip-ansi-escapes = "0.2"

[package]
name = "minotari_app_grpc"
description = "This crate is to provide a single source for all cross application grpc files and conversions to and from tari::core"
version = "5.2.1"
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.90.0"
authors = ["The Tari Development Community"]
repository = "https://github.com/tari-project/tari"
license = "BSD-3-Clause"

[package.metadata.cargo-machete]
ignored = ["prost"]

[features]
default = ["base_node"]
base_node = ["tari_core", "tari_comms"]

[dependencies]
base64 = "0.22"
prost = "0.13.3"
rcgen = "0.12.1"
subtle = "2.5.0"
zeroize = "1"

[dependencies.tari_common_types]
path = "base_layer/common_types"

[dependencies.tari_comms]
optional = true
path = "comms/core"

[dependencies.tari_core]
optional = true
path = "base_layer/core"
default-features = false

[dependencies.tari_crypto]
version = "0.22.1"

[dependencies.tari_script]
path = "infrastructure/tari_script"

[dependencies.tari_node_components]
path = "base_layer/node_components"

[dependencies.tari_max_size]
path = "infrastructure/max_size"

[dependencies.tari_sidechain]
path = "base_layer/sidechain"

[dependencies.tari_utilities]
version = "0.8"

[dependencies.tari_transaction_components]
path = "base_layer/transaction_components"

[dependencies.argon2]
version = "0.4.1"
features = ["std", "password-hash"]

[dependencies.borsh]
version = "1.5.7"

[dependencies.log]
version = "0.4"

[dependencies.rand]
version = "0.8"

[dependencies.thiserror]
version = "2"

[dependencies.tokio]
features = ["fs"]
version = "1.47"

[dependencies.tonic]
version = "0.13.1"
features = ["tls-ring"]

[build-dependencies]
tonic-build = "0.13.1"

[build-dependencies.tari_features]
path = "common/tari_features"

[package]
name = "minotari_ledger_wallet_common"
version = "5.2.1"
edition = "2021"
authors = ["The Tari Development Community"]
repository = "https://github.com/tari-project/tari"
license = "BSD-3-Clause"

[dependencies.bs58]
version = "0.5.1"
default-features = false
features = ["alloc"]

[dependencies.serde]
version = "1"
default-features = false
features = ["derive"]

[package]
name = "minotari_node_grpc_client"
description = "Base node GRPC client"
version = "5.2.1"
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.90.0"
authors = ["The Tari Development Community"]
repository = "https://github.com/tari-project/tari"
homepage = "https://tari.com"
readme = "README.md"
license = "BSD-3-Clause"

[dependencies.minotari_app_grpc]
path = "applications/minotari_app_grpc"

[dev-dependencies.tokio]
features = ["macros"]
version = "1.47"

[package]
name = "minotari_node_wallet_client"
version = "5.2.1"
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.90.0"
authors = ["The Tari Development Community"]
repository = "https://github.com/tari-project/tari"
license = "BSD-3-Clause"

[dependencies]
async-trait = "0.1.88"
serde_json = "1"
serde = "1"

[dependencies.tari_transaction_components]
path = "base_layer/transaction_components"

[dependencies.tari_utilities]
version = "0.8"

[dependencies.tari_shutdown]
path = "infrastructure/shutdown"

[dependencies.anyhow]
version = "1.0"

[dependencies.url]
version = "2.5.4"
features = ["default", "serde"]

[dependencies.reqwest]
version = "0.12.15"
features = ["default", "json"]

[dependencies.tokio]
features = ["sync"]
version = "1.47"

[dependencies.log]
features = []
version = "0.4"

[package]
name = "monero-address-creator"
authors = ["The Tari Development Community"]
description = "A Monero address creator"
repository = "https://github.com/tari-project/tari"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
crc = "1.8.1"
rand = "0.8.5"
sha3 = "0.10.8"
thiserror = "1.0.63"

[dependencies.base58-monero]
version = "2.0.0"
default-features = false

[dependencies.curve25519-dalek]
version = "4.1.3"

[package]
name = "psp"
description = "Cross-platform power state events plugin"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[features]
default = []

[dependencies]
libc = "0.2"
crossbeam-channel = "0.5"

[target."cfg(target_os = \"macos\")".dependencies]
objc = "0.2"
cocoa = "0.24"
core-foundation = "0.9"
core-graphics = "0.22"
dispatch = "0.2"
scopeguard = "1.1"
png = "0.17"

[target."cfg(target_os = \"windows\")".dependencies.windows]
version = "0.48"
features = ["Win32_Foundation", "Win32_Graphics_Gdi", "Win32_System_LibraryLoader", "Win32_System_Power", "Win32_System_RemoteDesktop", "Win32_System_SystemServices", "Win32_UI_Controls", "Win32_UI_WindowsAndMessaging"]

[target."cfg(any(target_os = \"linux\", target_os = \"dragonfly\", target_os = \"freebsd\", target_os = \"openbsd\", target_os = \"netbsd\"))".dependencies]
zbus = "3"

[target."cfg(any(target_os = \"linux\", target_os = \"dragonfly\", target_os = \"freebsd\", target_os = \"openbsd\", target_os = \"netbsd\"))".dependencies.tokio]
version = "1"
features = ["full"]

[dev-dependencies]
tao = "0.20.0"
winit = "0.28.6"

[package]
name = "tari_common"
description = "Utilities and features for the Tari domain layer, shared across both Base and Digital Asset layers."
readme = "README.md"
version = "5.2.1"
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.90.0"
authors = ["The Tari Development Community"]
repository = "https://github.com/tari-project/tari"
license = "BSD-3-Clause"

[features]
build = ["toml", "prost-build"]
static-application-info = ["git2"]

[dependencies]
dirs-next = "1.0.2"
path-clean = "0.1.0"
serde = "1"
serde_json = "1"
serde_yaml = "0.9.17"
sha2 = "0.10"
tempfile = "3.1.0"

[dependencies.tari_features]
path = "common/tari_features"

[dependencies.anyhow]
version = "1.0"

[dependencies.cargo_toml]
version = "0.20.4"

[dependencies.config]
version = "0.14.0"
default-features = false
features = ["toml"]

[dependencies.git2]
version = "0.18"
default-features = false
optional = true

[dependencies.log]
version = "0.4"

[dependencies.log4rs]
default-features = false
features = ["config_parsing", "threshold_filter", "yaml_format"]
version = "1.4"

[dependencies.multiaddr]
version = "0.14.0"

[dependencies.prost-build]
version = "0.11.9"
optional = true

[dependencies.structopt]
version = "0.3.13"
default-features = false

[dependencies.thiserror]
version = "2"

[dependencies.toml]
version = "0.5"
optional = true

[dev-dependencies]
toml = "0.5.8"

[dev-dependencies.tari_test_utils]
path = "infrastructure/test_utils"

[build-dependencies.tari_features]
path = "common/tari_features"

[lints.rust.unexpected_cfgs]
level = "warn"
check-cfg = ["cfg(tari_target_network_mainnet)", "cfg(tari_target_network_nextnet)"]

[package]
name = "tari_common_sqlite"
description = "Tari cryptocurrency wallet library"
version = "5.2.1"
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.90.0"
authors = ["The Tari Development Community"]
repository = "https://github.com/tari-project/tari"
license = "BSD-3-Clause"

[package.metadata.cargo-machete]
ignored = ["libsqlite3-sys"]

[features]
bundled = ["libsqlite3-sys/bundled"]

[dependencies]
diesel_migrations = "2.2"
serde = "1"
serde_json = "1"
lazy_static = "1.5.0"

[dependencies.tari_utilities]
version = "0.8"

[dependencies.diesel]
version = "2.2.10"
features = ["sqlite", "r2d2", "serde_json", "chrono", "64-column-tables"]

[dependencies.log]
version = "0.4"

[dependencies.rand]
version = "0.8"

[dependencies.thiserror]
version = "2"

[dependencies.tokio]
features = ["sync", "macros", "rt"]
version = "1.47"

[dependencies.libsqlite3-sys]
version = "0.30.1"
optional = true

[dev-dependencies.tokio]
features = ["sync", "macros", "rt", "time", "rt-multi-thread"]
version = "1.47"

[package]
name = "tari_common_types"
description = "Tari cryptocurrency common types"
version = "5.2.1"
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.90.0"
authors = ["The Tari Development Community"]
repository = "https://github.com/tari-project/tari"
license = "BSD-3-Clause"

[package.metadata.cargo-machete]
ignored = []

[features]
default = []
wasm = ["wasm-bindgen"]

[dependencies]
base64 = "0.22"
blake2 = "0.10"
bs58 = "0.5.1"
chacha20 = "0.7.1"
chacha20poly1305 = "0.10.1"
crc32fast = "1.2.1"
digest = "0.10"
newtype-ops = "0.1"
once_cell = "1.8.0"
strum = "0.22"
strum_macros = "0.22"
utoipa = "5.3.1"
zeroize = "1"
serde_json = "1"
subtle = "2.4.1"

[dependencies.tari_crypto]
version = "0.22.1"

[dependencies.tari_common]
path = "common"

[dependencies.tari_hashing]
path = "hashing"

[dependencies.tari_max_size]
path = "infrastructure/max_size"

[dependencies.tari_utilities]
version = "0.8"

[dependencies.argon2]
version = "0.4.1"
features = ["std", "alloc"]

[dependencies.bitflags]
version = "2.4"
features = ["serde"]

[dependencies.borsh]
version = "1.5.7"

[dependencies.rand]
version = "0.8"

[dependencies.serde]
features = ["derive"]
version = "1"

[dependencies.thiserror]
version = "2"

[dependencies.primitive-types]
version = "0.12"
features = ["serde"]

[dependencies.wasm-bindgen]
version = "0.2.100"
optional = true

[target."cfg(target_arch = \"wasm32\")".dependencies.getrandom]
version = "0.2"
features = ["js"]

[target."cfg(target_arch = \"wasm32\")".dependencies.js-sys]
version = "0.3.55"

[dev-dependencies]
hex = "0.4"

[dev-dependencies.chrono]
version = "0.4"
default-features = false
features = ["serde"]

[lib]
crate-type = ["cdylib", "rlib"]

[package]
name = "tari_comms"
description = "A peer-to-peer messaging system"
readme = "README.md"
version = "5.2.1"
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.90.0"
authors = ["The Tari Development Community"]
repository = "https://github.com/tari-project/tari"
license = "BSD-3-Clause"

[dependencies]
async-trait = "0.1.36"
blake2 = "0.10"
cidr = "0.1.0"
data-encoding = "2.2.0"
derivative = "2.2.0"
diesel_migrations = "2.2.0"
digest = "0.10"
once_cell = "1.8.0"
pin-project = "1.0.8"
prost = "0.13.3"
serde = "1"
serde_json = "1"
serde_derive = "1.0.119"
sha3 = "0.10"
tracing = "0.1.26"
yamux = "0.13.2"
zeroize = "1"
local-ip-address = "0.6.5"

[dependencies.tari_crypto]
version = "0.22.1"

[dependencies.tari_common_sqlite]
path = "common_sqlite"

[dependencies.tari_metrics]
optional = true
path = "infrastructure/metrics"

[dependencies.tari_storage]
path = "infrastructure/storage"

[dependencies.tari_shutdown]
path = "infrastructure/shutdown"

[dependencies.tari_utilities]
version = "0.8"

[dependencies.anyhow]
version = "1.0"

[dependencies.bitflags]
version = "2.4"
features = ["serde"]

[dependencies.bytes]
version = "1"
features = ["serde"]

[dependencies.chrono]
version = "0.4"
default-features = false
features = ["serde", "clock"]

[dependencies.diesel]
version = "2.2.10"
features = ["sqlite", "serde_json", "chrono", "numeric"]

[dependencies.futures]
version = "^0.3"
features = ["async-await"]

[dependencies.log]
features = ["std"]
version = "0.4"

[dependencies.multiaddr]
version = "0.14.0"

[dependencies.nom]
version = "7.1"
features = ["std"]
default-features = false

[dependencies.rand]
version = "0.8"

[dependencies.snow]
version = "0.9.5"
features = ["default-resolver"]

[dependencies.thiserror]
version = "2"

[dependencies.tokio]
features = ["rt-multi-thread", "time", "sync", "signal", "net", "macros", "io-util"]
version = "1.47"

[dependencies.tokio-stream]
version = "0.1.9"
features = ["sync"]

[dependencies.tokio-util]
version = "0.6.7"
features = ["codec", "compat"]

[dependencies.tower]
version = "0.4"
features = ["util"]

[dev-dependencies]
env_logger = "0.7.0"
tempfile = "3.1.0"

[dev-dependencies.tari_test_utils]
path = "infrastructure/test_utils"

[dev-dependencies.tari_comms_rpc_macros]
path = "comms/rpc_macros"

[dev-dependencies.toml]
version = "0.5"

[build-dependencies.tari_common]
features = ["build"]
path = "common"

[features]
c_integration = []
metrics = ["tari_metrics"]
rpc = ["tower/make", "tower/util"]

[package]
name = "tari_comms_dht"
description = "Tari comms DHT module"
readme = "README.md"
version = "5.2.1"
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.90.0"
authors = ["The Tari Development Community"]
repository = "https://github.com/tari-project/tari"
license = "BSD-3-Clause"

[dependencies]
blake2 = "0.10"
chacha20 = "0.7.1"
chacha20poly1305 = "0.10.1"
diesel_migrations = "2.2.0"
digest = "0.10"
futures = "^0.3.1"
futures-util = "^0.3.1"
prost = "0.13.3"
serde = "1"
zeroize = "1"
pin-project = "0.4"

[dependencies.tari_comms]
features = ["rpc"]
path = "comms/core"

[dependencies.tari_common]
path = "common"

[dependencies.tari_common_sqlite]
path = "common_sqlite"

[dependencies.tari_comms_rpc_macros]
path = "comms/rpc_macros"

[dependencies.tari_crypto]
version = "0.22.1"

[dependencies.tari_utilities]
version = "0.8"

[dependencies.tari_shutdown]
path = "infrastructure/shutdown"

[dependencies.anyhow]
version = "1.0"

[dependencies.bitflags]
version = "2.4"
features = ["serde"]

[dependencies.chrono]
version = "0.4"
default-features = false

[dependencies.diesel]
version = "2.2.10"
features = ["sqlite", "serde_json", "chrono", "numeric"]

[dependencies.log]
version = "0.4"

[dependencies.rand]
version = "0.8"

[dependencies.thiserror]
version = "2"

[dependencies.tower]
version = "0.4"
features = ["full"]

[dependencies.tokio]
features = ["rt", "macros"]
version = "1.47"

[dev-dependencies]
env_logger = "0.10"
lmdb-zero = "0.4.4"
once_cell = "1.8.0"
tempfile = "3.1.0"
petgraph = "0.5.1"
clap = "3.2"

[dev-dependencies.tari_test_utils]
path = "infrastructure/test_utils"

[dev-dependencies.futures-test]
version = "0.3.5"

[dev-dependencies.tokio-stream]
version = "0.1.9"
features = ["sync"]

[build-dependencies.tari_common]
path = "common"

[features]
test-mocks = []

[package]
name = "tari_comms_rpc_macros"
description = "RPC service proc macro"
authors = ["The Tari Development Community"]
repository = "https://github.com/tari-project/tari"
homepage = "https://tari.com"
readme = "README.md"
license = "BSD-3-Clause"
version = "5.2.1"
edition = "2021"

[lib]
proc-macro = true

[dependencies]
proc-macro2 = "1.0.24"
quote = "1.0.7"

[dependencies.syn]
version = "1.0.38"
features = ["fold", "full", "extra-traits"]

[dev-dependencies]
futures = "0.3.5"
prost = "0.13.3"
tower-service = "0.3"

[dev-dependencies.tari_comms]
path = "../core"
features = ["rpc"]

[dev-dependencies.tari_test_utils]
path = "../../infrastructure/test_utils"

[dev-dependencies.tokio]
features = ["macros"]
version = "1.47"

[package]
name = "tari_core"
description = "Core Tari protocol components"
version = "5.2.1"
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.90.0"
authors = ["The Tari Development Community"]
repository = "https://github.com/tari-project/tari"
license = "BSD-3-Clause"

[package.metadata.cargo-machete]
ignored = ["hickory-proto"]

[features]
default = []
benches = []
metrics = ["tari_metrics"]
sqlite_bundled = ["tari_common_sqlite/bundled"]

[dependencies]
bincode = "1.1.4"
blake2 = "0.10"
chacha20poly1305 = "0.10.1"
digest = "0.10"
dirs-next = "1.0.2"
fs2 = "0.4.0"
hex = "0.4.2"
integer-encoding = "3.0"
lmdb-zero = "0.4.4"
once_cell = "1.8.0"
prost = "0.13.3"
serde_json = "1"
serde_valid = "1.0.5"
sha3 = "0.10"
sha2 = "0.10"
strum_macros = "0.22"
tracing = "0.1.26"
url = "2.5.4"

[dependencies.tari_common]
path = "common"

[dependencies.tari_common_types]
path = "base_layer/common_types"

[dependencies.tari_common_sqlite]
path = "common_sqlite"

[dependencies.tari_comms]
features = ["rpc"]
path = "comms/core"

[dependencies.tari_comms_dht]
path = "comms/dht"
default-features = false

[dependencies.tari_comms_rpc_macros]
path = "comms/rpc_macros"

[dependencies.tari_crypto]
features = ["borsh"]
version = "0.22.1"

[dependencies.tari_hashing]
path = "hashing"

[dependencies.tari_node_components]
path = "base_layer/node_components"

[dependencies.tari_max_size]
path = "infrastructure/max_size"

[dependencies.tari_metrics]
optional = true
path = "infrastructure/metrics"

[dependencies.tari_mmr]
path = "base_layer/mmr"

[dependencies.tari_p2p]
path = "base_layer/p2p"

[dependencies.tari_script]
path = "infrastructure/tari_script"

[dependencies.tari_sidechain]
path = "base_layer/sidechain"

[dependencies.tari_service_framework]
path = "base_layer/service_framework"

[dependencies.tari_shutdown]
path = "infrastructure/shutdown"

[dependencies.tari_storage]
path = "infrastructure/storage"

[dependencies.tari_transaction_components]
path = "base_layer/transaction_components"

[dependencies.tari_test_utils]
path = "infrastructure/test_utils"

[dependencies.tari_utilities]
features = ["borsh"]
version = "0.8"

[dependencies.anyhow]
version = "1.0"

[dependencies.async-trait]
version = "0.1.50"

[dependencies.borsh]
features = ["derive"]
version = "1.5.7"

[dependencies.chrono]
version = "0.4"
default-features = false
features = ["serde"]

[dependencies.futures]
version = "^0.3.16"
features = ["async-await"]

[dependencies.hickory-proto]
version = "0.26.0-alpha.1"

[dependencies.jmt]
version = "0.11.0"
features = ["mocks"]

[dependencies.log]
version = "0.4"

[dependencies.monero]
version = "0.21.0"
features = ["serde-crate"]

[dependencies.rand]
version = "0.8"

[dependencies.randomx-rs]
version = "1.4"

[dependencies.serde]
features = ["derive"]
version = "1"

[dependencies.tiny-keccak]
package = "tari-tiny-keccak"
version = "2.0.2"
features = ["keccak"]

[dependencies.thiserror]
version = "2"

[dependencies.tokio]
features = ["time", "sync", "macros", "net"]
version = "1.47"

[dependencies.primitive-types]
version = "0.12"
features = ["serde"]

[dev-dependencies]
tempfile = "3.1.0"
quickcheck = "1.0"
serial_test = "0.5"
env_logger = "0.7.1"

[dev-dependencies.criterion]
version = "0.4.0"

[dev-dependencies.tari_p2p]
features = ["test-mocks"]
path = "base_layer/p2p"

[dev-dependencies.tari_test_utils]
path = "infrastructure/test_utils"

[dev-dependencies.config]
version = "0.14.0"

[build-dependencies.tari_common]
features = ["build"]
path = "common"

[build-dependencies.tari_features]
path = "common/tari_features"

[[bench]]
name = "mempool"
harness = false

[lints.rust.unexpected_cfgs]
level = "warn"
check-cfg = ["cfg(tari_target_network_mainnet)", "cfg(tari_target_network_nextnet)", "cfg(tari_target_network_testnet)"]

[package]
name = "tari_features"
description = "Compilable features for Tari applications"
readme = "README.md"
version = "5.2.1"
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.90.0"
authors = ["The Tari Development Community"]
repository = "https://github.com/tari-project/tari"
license = "BSD-3-Clause"

[package]
name = "tari_hashing"
description = "Tari hash domains"
readme = "README.md"
version = "5.2.1"
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.90.0"
authors = ["The Tari Development Community"]
repository = "https://github.com/tari-project/tari"
license = "BSD-3-Clause"

[dependencies.tari_crypto]
features = ["borsh"]
version = "0.22.1"

[dependencies.borsh]
version = "1.5.7"

[dependencies.digest]
version = "0.10"

[dependencies.blake2]
version = "0.10"
default-features = false

[package]
name = "tari_jellyfish"
version = "5.2.1"
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.90.0"
authors = ["The Tari Development Community"]

[dependencies]
digest = "0.10"

[dependencies.tari_hashing]
path = "hashing"

[dependencies.tari_crypto]
version = "0.22.1"

[dependencies.serde]
features = ["derive"]
